vars.email_subject: Need your approval on the Q1 budget
vars.email_body: Hey, I need your sign-off on the Q1 budget proposal before the board meeting on Thursday, March 19. The finance team can't proceed without your approval. The proposal is attached. Key numbers: $240,000 total budget, with $80,000 allocated for new engineering hires. Can you review and approve by EOD Wednesday? Thanks, Sarah
